things.name: Agadir Beach
things.description: 10km of golden sand beach on the Atlantic - Morocco's finest resort beach

things.name: Agadir Oufella Ruins
things.description: Ruins of the 1573 Kasbah on the hill - destroyed by earthquake in 1960 but the view remains

things.name: Souk El Had
things.description: One of the largest traditional markets in Morocco with everything from spices to carpets

things.name: La Medina d'Agadir
things.description: Reconstruction of a traditional Moroccan medina - newly built but artfully crafted

things.name: Paradis Plage Surf Resort
things.description: World-class surfing beach south of Agadir with a famous surf school

things.name: Crocoparc
things.description: Park with 300 Nile crocodiles and exotic gardens

things.name: Musee Municipal du Patrimoine Amazigh
things.description: Museum of Berber culture with traditional jewellery, textiles and instruments

things.name: Taghazout Village
things.description: Fishing village 20km north transformed into a surf mecca with blue-painted boats

things.name: Sous-Massa National Park
things.description: Flamingos, bald ibis and gazelles in a coastal national park south of Agadir

things.name: Argan Oil Cooperative
things.description: Visit Berber women's cooperatives hand-pressing the rare and precious argan oil
